name: Bricks Crusher Breaker Ball
short_description: A classic brick breaking game in the form of a fun, casual physics puzzle game. Break through endless blocks with multitudes of balls, special abilities, and more!
detailed_description:
Welcome to “Bricks Crusher Breaker Ball” - a fun iteration of the classic brick game that's loved all over the world!

Brick games, including this one, have the potential to bring near infinite fun.
Bricks Crusher Breaker Ball has a plethora of hand-crafted levels, many skill blocks and skill balls for you to have fun with, as well as different challenge modes!
What are you waiting for? Try it and see how surprisingly addictive such a simple game can get!

Break bricks, gain coins, unlock various mysterious skill balls, discover new strategies, and even participate in unique duel levels!

Are you in need of a casual game to kill time and relieve pressure? Make yourself comfortable with Bricks Crusher Breaker Ball!

Features:
- Smooth aiming
- 100 + levels
- Timed and unlockable special events
- Many eye candy abilities and blocks
- Hours of brain numbing fun!
